title: ふたりの相性はいかに！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We drop by a mall on our way back from an
outing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! Th-th-this is quite the predicament!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter, Fukukitaru? You seem a little
distraught.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Fortune smiles upon me! A savior! Rescue
me, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Anyhoo! Please, direct your gaze over here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: This is a... umm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Exaaactamundo! All you have to do is put in your
names and some money, and it will divine your
compatibility!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
According to the word of the great Shiraoki,
seeing a 100% match in this is good luck...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But! Here I am, having forgotten entirely who I
was going to ask about!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wh-what a... disaster?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I need your help, Suzuka! Believe
you me, this game is well-known to be super
accurate!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind, but... is it really okay for me to do it
for you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, totally. As long as the divination comes out
to 100% compatibility and I see it, it's all good.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, if you've got someone in mind, just let me
know!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki is pretty easygoing, huh? I
wonder who I should choose, then...
choice_data_list: Want to try it with me?
Want to try it with me?
Why don't you try it with Matikanefukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki is pretty easygoing, huh? I
wonder who I should choose, then...
choice_data_list: Want to try it with me?
Want to try it with me?
Why don't you try it with Matikanefukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: With you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Good idea! I'm sure you two have perfect
compatibility! I'll watch from here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A-are you sure? It has to be 100%, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-ching!

text_block_list.name: Game
text_block_list.text: "Please enter two names!"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Umm... "Silence Suzuka," and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Something about your names just screams
compatibility! This must be fate!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, you seem very excited, but don't be too
disappointed if it's not 100%, okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Impossible! Not even if this were the unluckiest of
unlucky days!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you two are the best of partners. Isn't
that right, Suzuka's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Not you too...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay, I guess. Here we go...

text_block_list.name: Game
text_block_list.text: "Your compatibility is..."

text_block_list.name: Game
text_block_list.text:
"100%! You're fated to be together! Make sure to
express your gratitude for one another regularly
and you will have good fortune!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: There! There! My eyes do not deceive! Praise be!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I-it's really 100%.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You heard what the divination said, so show your
gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You mean right this second?
choice_data_list: Thank you for always trying your best.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, wait a moment! Um... Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you for all of your... training...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aha ha ha! Very good! Very good, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: D-don't tease me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that this compatibility divination has
deepened Silence Suzuka's trust in me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As you wish! When it comes to fortune-telling, I
always give my all!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All we do is enter our names, though... You can't
really give that your all, can you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-ching!

text_block_list.name: Game
text_block_list.text: "Please enter two names!"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Umm... "Silence Suzuka," and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: "Matikanefukukitaru!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aha ha! I can see it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I see it clearly! Our compatibility is perfect. Like a
pair of lion-dog statues before a torii gate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thank you! We will!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I don't think there's anything left to do...

text_block_list.name: Game
text_block_list.text: "Your compatibility is..."

text_block_list.name: Game
text_block_list.text:
"95%! So close! Try to challenge each other every
now and again!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Waaaaahhh! It's not 100%?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well... It said we should try to challenge each
other.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That must be the key to getting the last five
percent! Suzuka! There's no time to lose...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Right. Let's race back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ready? Go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-wait a second!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, they're able to get a 100%
compatibility reading a few days later.
